notes: Functional-congruence analogue of thm:eq-pred (0005). The standard proof seeds a reflexive instance f(...,t1,...)=f(...,t1,...) (def:eq-refl) and rewrites the second t1 to t2 via def:eq-elim, exactly the pattern confirmed for thm:eq-sym (0006) and used by thm:eq-trans (0008). So def:eq-refl is the load-bearing reflexive seed by parallel -- but it is not licensed by any span of this statement (Rule 2), so it is flagged rather than added. Reviewer: add def:eq-refl for consistency with the sibling equality theorems, unless def:eq-elim is taken to deliver functional congruence directly.
